text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Machi! I'm afraid you are... cursed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And here I thought I just had average luck! No
way! What kind of curse is it?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
According to the great Shiraoki, it is the curse of
"unfortunate timing"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
"Unfortunate timing"? What does that mean?! I'm
literally cursed with bad timing?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I knew it... I've had lots of moments where I felt
like "Why today of all days?"

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Fuku! Isn't there anything you can do? Please
break the curse on me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh. There certainly is! Why do you think
I brought up the subject?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It is because I come bearing the great Shiraoki's
holy water—
